title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Vegapunk, Unknown person #2, Nusjuro, Unknown person #3 as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
